creator: mazhe@alkumuna.eu
text:
Created attachment 156011
The update.

Disclaimer: this request concern dns/mDNSResponder_nss, not net/mDNSResponder, which it extends by providing a NSS plugin

Following the update of net/mDNSResponder to 567, dns/mDNSResponder_nss can also be updated. Very trivial update once again, only version string and distfile checksums were updated.

Thanks
